creator: adam.strohl-fbsd@ateamsystems.com
text:
Created attachment 171658
full poudriere build log

When building rsyslog7 with GNUTLS enabled I get the following error:

nsd_gtls.c:237:15: error: unknown type name 'gnutls_retr_st'; did you mean 'gnutls_retr2_st'?
              gnutls_retr_st *st)
              ^~~~~~~~~~~~~~
              gnutls_retr2_st
/usr/local/include/gnutls/gnutls.h:2019:3: note: 'gnutls_retr2_st' declared here
} gnutls_retr2_st;
  ^

That is the first one, there are others (see attached full poudriere log).
